markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires to the Client Ops team's tech stack and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Stack:** The platform uses three interconnected apps: **Atlas** (customer UI), **Flow** (backend repo of \~150 workflows), and **Flow Studio** (dev observability tool).](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**AI-First Development:** Use **Claude Code** for all workflow development. It's the default and most effective tool, outperforming Cursor in company trials.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [**Critical Debugging Tool:** **LangFuse** traces all LLM calls in production, showing every step and retry. This is essential for debugging non-deterministic AI outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:** This week is for reading and setup. Kirkland will lead a live workflow build session (Wed/Thu) and a Friday check-in.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)

## Topics

### Team & Onboarding Logistics

  - [**Team:** Client Ops Engineering (Kirkland, Marcus, Nico, Sergey, Tamyres) and Isaac (Product, onboarding with Client Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Onboarding Support:** Kirkland is the primary contact for all questions, acting as the onboarding buddy.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
  - [**Access Issue:** New hires are blocked from starting by a lack of GitHub access.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Kirkland messaged Yousef (IT) to grant access.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Onboarding Checklists:** The Linear and Notion checklists are generic. The focus this week is on reading and setup, not coding.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)

### Core Platform Architecture

  - [**Atlas (Customer UI):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [The customer-facing tool for running AI pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [Replaced Airtable to handle scaling needs.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [Pipelines are YAML configurations that sequence workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Flow (Backend Repo):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [The central repository containing \~150 atomized workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Workflows are built using AI-assisted development (Claude Code).](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [Core workflows (Research, Drafting, Post-processing) are used by most customers.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Flow Studio (Dev Tool):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [A separate frontend for testing and observability.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Library:** Browse all workflows with auto-generated docs and run samples.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Observability:** Inspect live workflow runs. The "Inspect" button in Atlas links directly to the run's trace in Flow Studio.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

### Key Tools & Workflows

  - [**Claude Code:**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [The default and recommended AI coding assistant.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [The `flow` repo includes a `cursor_rules` file to enforce this preference.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Use personal API keys for individual usage tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [**Linear (Project Management):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [The source of truth for engineering tasks and sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [**Workflow Note:** Customer-facing teams often don't respond in Linear. To get their attention, create a Slack thread and link it to the Linear issue.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Slack (Communication):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [The primary communication tool.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Best Practice:** Use public channels for questions. Search (`Cmd+K`) before asking, as answers are often in past threads.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2369.0)
  - [**LangFuse (LLM Observability):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Traces every LLM call in production, showing inputs, outputs, and retries.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Essential for debugging non-deterministic AI outputs by seeing the agent's full thought process.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Notion (Documentation):**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [A vast repository of information.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Explore the handbook for context. Treat older docs in `Build` and `Delivery` as historical context, not current process.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kirkland:**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Follow up with Yousef (IT) to grant new hires GitHub access.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Schedule a 2-hour live workflow-building session for Wed/Thu.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)
      - [Schedule a Friday check-in to review progress.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [**Sergey, Tamyres, Isaac:**](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
      - [Prioritize reading all onboarding materials and exploring Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
      - Use the `#onboarding` Slack channel for all questions.
      - [Prepare for the Client Ops kickoff and All Hands meetings tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/AsQuCu6GtM_sGM4WPsqwzcvG4vaBjWU1?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
